info.title: Onshape API - Revision
info.description: Get revision information. See [API Guide: Release Management](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/relmgmt/)

tags.name: Revision
tags.description: Get revision information. See [API Guide: Release Management](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/relmgmt/)

get.summary: Get details for the specified revision.
get.description: If the `revision` parameter is left blank, the latest revision information is returned. See [API Guide: Release Management](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/relmgmt/#get-latest-revision-info) for more details.

parameters.name: cid
parameters.description: The company or enterprise ID that owns the resource.

parameters.name: pnum
parameters.description: Part number.

parameters.name: revision
parameters.description: ID of the revision to get

parameters.name: elementType
parameters.description: Element Type. Must be one of: `-1`: Unknown, `0`: Part Studio, `1`: Assembly, `2`: Drawing. `4` : Blob, `8`: Variable Studio

get.summary: Get all revisions for a company.
get.description:
See [API Guide: Release Management](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/relmgmt/#get-all-revisions) for more details. 
* Returns a list of `limit` size of all objects per API call. 
* To get the next set of results, use the `next` URL from the response body. 
* Do not change any other query parameters during subsequent enumeration. 
* Persist `after` query param value and use it to begin a fresh enumeration at a later date. 
* This API can only be called by company admins.

parameters.name: cid
parameters.description: The company or enterprise ID that owns the resource.

parameters.name: elementType
parameters.description: Element Type. Must be one of: `-1`: Unknown, `0`: Part Studio, `1`: Assembly, `2`: Drawing. `4` : Blob, `8`: Variable Studio

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of list entries to return in a single API call.

parameters.name: latestOnly
parameters.description: Whether to limit search to only latest revisions.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The earliest creation date of the revision to find.

get.summary: Get all revisions for an element (tab).
get.description: See [API Guide: Release Management](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/relmgmt/#get-latest-revision-info) for more details.

parameters.name: cid
parameters.description: The company or enterprise ID that owns the resource.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

parameters.name: wv
parameters.description: Indicates which of workspace (w) or version (v) id is specified below.

parameters.name: wvid
parameters.description: The id of the workspace, version in which the operation should be performed.

parameters.name: eid
parameters.description: The id of the element in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: configuration
parameters.description: URL-encoded string of configuration values (separated by `;`). See the [Configurations API Guide](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/configs/) for details.

parameters.name: elementType
parameters.description: Element Type. Must be one of: `-1`: Unknown, `0`: Part Studio, `1`: Assembly, `2`: Drawing. `4` : Blob, `8`: Variable Studio

parameters.name: fillApprovers
parameters.description: Set to `true` to return a list of approvers. Default is `false` and will return `null`.

parameters.name: fillExportPermission
parameters.description: Set to `true` to return a list of export permissions. Default is `false` and will return `null`.

parameters.name: supportChangeType
parameters.description: Whether the revision can change object type. Used in reuse part number flow.

get.summary: Get all revisions for a part ID.
get.description: See [API Guide: Release Management](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/relmgmt/#get-latest-revision-info) for more details.

parameters.name: cid
parameters.description: The company or enterprise ID that owns the resource.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: Document ID.

parameters.name: wv
parameters.description: One of w or v corresponding to whether a workspace or version was specified.

parameters.name: wvid
parameters.description: Workspace (w) or Version (v) ID.

parameters.name: eid
parameters.description: Element ID.

parameters.name: pid
parameters.description: Part ID.

parameters.name: configuration
parameters.description: URL-encoded string of configuration values (separated by `;`). See the [Configurations API Guide](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/configs/) for details.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: Id of document that links to the document being accessed. This may provide additional access rights to the document. Allowed only with version (v) path parameter.

parameters.name: fillApprovers
parameters.description: Set to `true` to return a list of approvers. Default is `false` and will return `null`.

parameters.name: fillExportPermission
parameters.description: Set to `true` to return a list of export permissions. Default is `false` and will return `null`.

parameters.name: supportChangeType
parameters.description: Whether the revision can change object type. Used in reuse part number flow.

get.summary: Get all revisions for a part number.
get.description: You can also request `elementType` in addition to `partNumber` since companies may or may not allow drawings to share part numbers with their parts/assemblies. To perform search without `elementType`, use `elementType = -1` (UNKNOWN).  See [API Guide: Release Management](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/relmgmt/#get-all-revisions) for more details.

parameters.name: cid
parameters.description: The company or enterprise ID that owns the resource.

parameters.name: pnum
parameters.description: Part number.

parameters.name: elementType
parameters.description: Element Type. Must be one of: `-1`: Unknown, `0`: Part Studio, `1`: Assembly, `2`: Drawing. `4` : Blob, `8`: Variable Studio

parameters.name: fillApprovers
parameters.description: Set to `true` to return a list of approvers. Default is `false` and will return `null`.

parameters.name: fillExportPermission
parameters.description: Set to `true` to return a list of export permissions. Default is `false` and will return `null`.

parameters.name: supportChangeType
parameters.description: Whether the revision can change object type. Used in reuse part number flow.

delete.summary: Delete all revisions for a part number.
delete.description: Only company admins can call this API. All documents that contain or use the part number must be deleted first. This operation cannot be undone.

parameters.name: cid
parameters.description: The company or enterprise ID that owns the resource.

parameters.name: pnum
parameters.description: Part number.

parameters.name: et
parameters.description: Element Type. Must be one of: `0`: Part Studio, `1`: Assembly, `2`: Drawing. `4` : Blob

parameters.name: ignoreLinkedDocuments
parameters.description: By default, revisions will be deleted for the part number in the specified, and all linked documents. Set to `true` to only delete revisions in the specified document.

get.summary: Get all revisions for a document.
get.description: Retrieve a list of all revisions that exist in a document and are owned by the document's owning company.  See [API Guide: Release Management](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/relmgmt/#get-all-revisions) for more details.

get.summary: Get all revisions for a version.
get.description: Retrieve a list of all revisions that exist in a document version and are owned by the document's owning company.  See [API Guide: Release Management](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/relmgmt/#get-all-revisions) for more details.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: Document ID.

parameters.name: vid
parameters.description: Version ID.

get.summary: Get the latest revision information for a part.
get.description: See [API Guide: Release Management](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/relmgmt/#get-latest-revision-info) for more details. Returns 204 if no revisions are found.

parameters.name: cd
parameters.description: Use `c` to specify a company ID or `d` to specify a document ID.

parameters.name: cdid
parameters.description: Company ID or document ID

parameters.name: pnum
parameters.description: Part number.

parameters.name: et
parameters.description: Element Type. Must be one of: `-1`: Unknown, `0`: Part Studio, `1`: Assembly, `2`: Drawing. `4` : Blob, `8`: Variable Studio

approvers.description: The users who approved the release package that created this revision.

canChangeType.description: Whether the revision can change object type. Used in reuse part number flow.

companyId.description: The company or enterprise ID that owns the resource.

description.description: The Revision Description metadata property if revision is of a drawing.

documentId.description: The document that contains the revision object.

documentName.description: The name of the document that contains the revision object.

documentState.description: The state of document containing this revision. Used in reuse part number flow

elementId.description: The element that contains the revision object.

elementType.description: The type of item Element Type. Must be one of: `-1`: Unknown, `0`: Part Studio, `1`: Assembly, `2`: Drawing. `4` : Blob, `8`: Variable Studio

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

isObsolete.description: Whether the revision has been obsoleted.

isRereleasable.description: If true, the revision can be created again.

nextRevisionId.description: The next revision if applicable. null for the latest revision.

obsoletionPackageId.description: The OBSOLETION release package that obsoleted this revision if applicable.

partNumber.description: The part number with which the object was revised.

previousRevisionId.description: The previous revision if applicable. null for first revision.

releaseId.description: The release package that created this revision.

releaseName.description: The name of the release package that created this item.

versionId.description: The version of the document that contains this revision.

versionName.description: The name of the version of the document that contains this revision.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

href.description: URI for current page of resources.

items.description: Array of items in the current page.

next.description: URI for next page of the resources if more are available.

previous.description: URI for previous page of the resources.

BTListResponseBTRevisionInfo.description: A list of resources that typically supports paging.

href.description: URI for current page of resources.

items.description: Array of items in the current page.

next.description: URI for next page of the resources if more are available.

previous.description: URI for previous page of the resources.

id.description: User ID of the user who approved the revision.

name.description: Name of the user who approved the revision.

BTRevisionApproverInfo.description: The users who approved the release package that created this revision.
